/opt/devkitpro/devkitARM/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=arm7tdmi -mtune=arm7tdmi -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -mcpu=arm7tdmi -mtune=arm7tdmi -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -Wl,--gc-sections "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/core/main.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/core/game.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/core/piece.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/input/input.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/rendering/render_ds.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf.dir/src/platform/platform_ds.c.obj" -o BLOCK-BLAST-DS.elf   -L/opt/devkitpro/libnds/lib  -lnds9 -lc -lm
